issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getDataNetworkType: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE or android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getServiceState: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE and android.permission.ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getDataNetworkType: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE or android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by TelephonyManager.getVoiceNetworkType: android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE or android.permission.READ_BASIC_PHONE_STATE
Field requires API level 33 (current min is 27): `android.Manifest.permission#POST_NOTIFICATIONS`
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 27): `android.net.LinkProperties#getPrivateDnsServerName`
Call requires API level 29 (current min is 27): `android.net.LinkProperties#getMtu`
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 27): `android.net.LinkProperties#getPrivateDnsServerName`
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 27): `android.telephony.TelephonyManager#getSignalStrength`
Call requires API level 28 (current min is 27): `android.telephony.TelephonyManager#getSimCarrierIdName`
Call requires API level 29 (current min is 27): `android.telephony.SignalStrength#getCellSignalStrengths`

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Requiring Wifi permissions limits app availability on TVs that support only Ethernet
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="host_autolearn_cli_status_body">Visual host learning settings are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Use --host-autolearn, --host-autolearn-penalty-ttl, --host-autolearn-max-hosts, and optional --host-autolearn-file in command line settings.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="host_autolearn_cli_status_body">Визуальные настройки обучения по хостам приостановлены, пока включены аргументы RIPDPI командной строки. Используйте --host-autolearn, --host-autolearn-penalty-ttl, --host-autolearn-max-hosts и необязательный --host-autolearn-file в настройках командной строки.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="activation_window_cli_body">Visual activation-window controls are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Use --round, --payload-size-range, and --stream-byte-range in command line settings for the next start.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="activation_window_cli_body">Визуальные элементы управления окном активации приостановлены, пока включены аргументы RIPDPI командной строки. Используйте --round, --payload-size-range и --stream-byte-range в настройках командной строки для следующего запуска.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="quic_fake_profile_cli_body">Visual QUIC fake payload settings are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Use --fake-quic-profile and --fake-quic-host in command line settings for the next start.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="quic_fake_profile_cli_body">Визуальные настройки fake-нагрузки QUIC приостановлены, пока включены аргументы RIPDPI командной строки. Используйте --fake-quic-profile и --fake-quic-host в настройках командной строки для следующего запуска.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fake_payload_library_cli_body">Visual fake payload presets are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Command line flags or --fake-data will decide the effective payloads on the next start.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="fake_payload_library_cli_body">Визуальные пресеты fake-нагрузок приостановлены, пока включены аргументы RIPDPI командной строки. Флаги командной строки или --fake-data определят эффективные нагрузки при следующем запуске.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="ripdpi_fake_tls_cli_status_body">Visual fake TLS controls are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Use --fake-tls-mod, --fake-sni, and the rest of your command line profile for the next start.</string>

issue.message: Replace "--" with an "em dash" character (—, —) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="ripdpi_fake_tls_cli_status_body">Визуальные элементы управления Fake TLS приостановлены, пока включены необработанные аргументы RIPDPI. Используйте --fake-tls-mod, --fake-sni и остальные параметры командной строки для следующего запуска.</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="config_split_marker_helper">Manual markers accept offsets like 1, host, method+2, midsld-1, or 1+s. Use the adaptive preset selector or the raw chain DSL for auto(...).</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="config_split_marker_helper">Ручные маркеры принимают смещения вида 1, host, method+2, midsld-1 или 1+s. Используйте адаптивный селектор пресетов или DSL цепочки для auto(...).</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="config_fake_offset_marker_helper">Accepts numeric or semantic offsets like 0, host+1, endhost-2, or 1+se. Adaptive auto(...) markers are not supported here.</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="config_fake_offset_marker_helper">Принимает числовые или семантические смещения вида 0, host+1, endhost-2 или 1+se. Адаптивные маркеры auto(...) здесь не поддерживаются.</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="adaptive_split_cli_body">Visual adaptive split controls are paused while raw RIPDPI arguments are enabled. Use explicit markers or auto(...) in command line chain arguments for the next start.</string>

issue.message: Replace "..." with ellipsis character (…, …) ?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="adaptive_split_cli_body">Визуальные элементы управления адаптивным разделением приостановлены, пока включены аргументы RIPDPI командной строки. Используйте явные маркеры или auto(...) в аргументах цепочки командной строки для следующего запуска.</string>

Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
issue.errorLine1: private fun packageUri(packageName: String): Uri = Uri.parse("package:$packageName")
